name: Customer Accounts & Authentication
description: Customer-facing account creation, login, and order history. Required for any meaningful customer experience.

name: Product Catalog & Discovery
description: Real product imagery, search/autocomplete, strain enrichment, and image upload pipeline.

name: Payments & Tax
description: Tax breakdown on receipts and customer-facing tax display. (See also: Cannabis Payment Processor epic.)

name: Promotions & Loyalty
description: Promotions/discounts engine and loyalty/rewards system - core sales drivers for dispensaries.

name: Sales Channels & Fulfillment
description: In-store kiosk, delivery/fulfillment module, and POS integrations (Dutchie/Treez).

name: Staff Management & HR
description: Staffing module, time clock, payroll export, scheduling, and timesheet workflows for staff and admin portals.

name: Inventory Management
description: Inventory filters in staff and admin screens, plus real-time stock control, low-stock alerts, and Metrc reconciliation.

name: Analytics & Reporting
description: Dashboards for sales, inventory, customer behavior, and operational metrics.

name: Design System
description: Spring Bloom theme, additional themes, admin theme preview, and unification of theme-presets vs design-systems.

name: Data Integrity & Code Quality
description: Dispensary UUID fix, Metrc retry CRON, ESLint config, and ongoing code quality work.

name: Real-time & Mobile
description: WebSocket real-time updates and PWA mobile support.

name: DevOps & Production Hardening
description: Docker Compose, CI/CD, environment configs, SSL/domain, backups, and monitoring/alerting.

name: Cannabis-Friendly Payment Processor
description: Evaluate and integrate a cannabis-friendly payment processor (Stripe is OFF the table per ToS). Includes webhook registration, signature verification, retry logic, and refunds.

name: Real-time Inventory Management
description: Real-time stock decrement, low-stock alerts, Metrc reconciliation, manual stock adjustments with audit, and bulk import.

name: Compliance & Regulatory
description: Purchase limits (NY/NJ/CT), tax reporting exports, audit logs, COA document attachment, and seed-to-sale traceability. Age verification already done.

name: Multi-tenancy & Tenant Administration
description: Tenant onboarding, configuration, suspension/offboarding, super-admin tooling, and usage metering.

name: Billing & Subscription Management
description: Dispensary-facing billing for Starter/Growth/Enterprise tiers - subscription lifecycle, invoicing, dunning, plan changes.

name: Notifications & Communications
description: Branded transactional email per tenant, SMS, push notifications, in-app notifications, marketing opt-in management.

name: Security & Access Control
description: RBAC refinement, 2FA/MFA, session management, password reset, rate limiting, audit logs, secret rotation.

name: Onboarding & Self-Service Setup
description: New dispensary signup flow, guided setup wizard, sample data seeding, onboarding drip.

name: Customer Support Tooling
description: Internal support portal, tenant impersonation with audit, support tickets, help center, contact form.

name: Documentation
description: API docs, admin/staff guides, video walkthroughs, changelog, ops runbooks.

name: Testing & QA Infrastructure
description: E2E suite, integration tests for critical paths, load testing, smoke tests, test data management.

name: Performance & Scalability
description: DB query optimization, Redis caching, CDN, image optimization, GraphQL complexity limits, N+1 auditing.

name: Accessibility (WCAG)
description: Storefront WCAG 2.1 AA audit, keyboard navigation, screen reader support, theme contrast verification, accessibility statement.

name: Internationalization
description: i18n framework, CAD currency, French/Quebec support, CTLS abstraction layer (for Phase 5 Canada expansion).
